response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a Staff-level engineer with 16+ years of fullstack experience, currently at Google building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks — a direct match for the role's AI agent development requirement that few candidates will satisfy. His Meta tenure demonstrates production-scale TypeScript, React, AWS, and MongoDB delivery, and his career shows consistent depth across backend, frontend, cloud, and containerization. The primary gaps are NestJS (not mentioned despite being the core backend framework), Kotlin (only Java noted), and explicit testing framework callouts (Vitest/Playwright absent), but his strong TDD culture and engineering depth make these bridgeable.
strengths: Current hands-on AI agent and MCP framework development at Google directly satisfies the role's AI agent requirement
16+ years of fullstack depth across TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS CDK, MongoDB, and Docker at Staff/Senior level in top-tier companies
Demonstrated software craftsmanship culture — TDD practice at RIDE, open-source testing tooling, and teaching workshops signals high code quality bar
concerns: NestJS is entirely absent from the resume despite being the primary backend framework called out in the job stack
Kotlin is not listed in skills; only Java is referenced, leaving the secondary backend language requirement only partially addressed
No explicit mention of Vitest, Jest, or Playwright, making hands-on experience with the required testing frameworks unclear

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP infrastructure experience
TypeScript / Node.js / React / AWS / MongoDB stack alignment
